Cookie Controller Test Page

This page is served by the Playwright acceptance script and seeded with test cookies through Set-Cookie headers.

Visible document.cookie


        
      


      

        
Visible web storage

        

        
      


      

        
Expected server-seeded cookies

        

          
            

              Name
              Purpose
            

          
          
            

              plain
              basic list coverage
            

            

              editable
              value edit coverage
            

            

              delete_me
              delete coverage
            

            

              encoded
              URL decode and JSON format coverage
            

            

              jwt
              JWT payload decode coverage
            

            

              http_only
              Chrome cookies API HttpOnly visibility coverage
